title: ClosedFormula
summary: Defines the proposed closed product formula for OR coefficients.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Defines the proposed closed product formula for OR coefficients.

mathematicalContent.heading: How to read the translation
mathematicalContent.body: The correspondence below follows PolyGJMSoperators/OR/Coefficients/ClosedFormula.lean declaration by declaration. A definition is translated by its defining expression, a theorem by its quantified proposition, and a structure, class, or inductive type by the mathematical data encoded in its fields or constructors. The original Lean signature remains visible beside every translation.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A closed formula for OR rational coefficients. Its mathematical data are: coeff: N maps to n w₁ w₂ : ℚ maps to ORIndex N maps to ℚ.

The coefficient system associated to a closed formula. In explicit terms, for φ of type orclosed coefficient formula, n in the natural numbers, and n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, its defining expression is coeff : equals Φ.coeff N n w₁ w₂.
correspondence.leanType: def toCoefficientSystem (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : ORCoefficientSystem N

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For Φ of type ORClosed Coefficient Formula, N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, Φ.to Coefficient System N n w₁ w₂.coeff I equals Φ.coeff N n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,Φ\colon \operatorname{ORClosedCoefficientFormula},\;N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\quad (Φ.\operatorname{toCoefficientSystem} N n w₁ w₂).\operatorname{coeff} I = Φ.\operatorname{coeff} N n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.leanType: theorem toCoefficientSystem_coeff (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : (Φ.toCoefficientSystem N n w₁ w₂).coeff I = Φ.coeff N n w₁ w₂ I

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: A closed formula satisfies the OR recurrence for a chosen defect basis. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, κ a type, φ of type orclosed coefficient formula, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, k a finite set, and defectcoeffq of type orindex n maps to fin 2 maps to κ maps to ℚ, its defining expression is Satisfies ORRecurrence w₁ w₂ n K Φ.to Coefficient System N n w₁ w₂ defect Coeff Q.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{SatisfiesRecurrence}(Φ,n,w₁,w₂,K,defectCoeffQ)=\operatorname{SatisfiesORRecurrence} w₁ w₂ n K (Φ.\operatorname{toCoefficientSystem} N n w₁ w₂) \operatorname{defectCoeffQ}
correspondence.leanType: def SatisfiesRecurrence {N : ℕ} {κ : Type _} [DecidableEq κ] (Φ : ORClosedCoefficientFormula) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (K : Finset κ) (defectCoeffQ : ORIndex N → Fin 2 → κ → ℚ) : Prop

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The multinomial factor in the regular OR formula. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is multinomial Q3 N I.a I.b I.c.
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularMultinomialFactor {N : ℕ} (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular Gamma-ratio part a_{s,t} of the OR formula, expressed via Pochhammer symbols. Here I.b = s and I.c = t. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is pochhammer Q ORAlpha N n w₁ w₂ I.b plus I.c times pochhammer Q ORBeta N n w₁ N minus I.b times pochhammer Q ORGamma N n w₂ N minus I.c.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{ORRegularA}(n,w₁,w₂,I)=\operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORAlpha} N n w₁ w₂) (b_{\mathrm{I}} + c_{\mathrm{I}}) \cdot \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORBeta} N n w₁) (N - b_{\mathrm{I}}) \cdot \operatorname{pochhammerQ} (\operatorname{ORGamma} N n w₂) (N - c_{\mathrm{I}})
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularA {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular OR coefficient attached to an index (a,b,c). In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and i of type orindex n, its defining expression is ORRegular Multinomial Factor I times ORRegular A n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.leanType: def ORRegularCoeff {N : ℕ} (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : ℚ

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular closed formula from Theorem 1.1, in rational/Pochhammer form. In explicit terms, its defining expression is coeff : equals fun n w₁ w₂ I maps to ORRegular Coeff n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \operatorname{ORRegularClosedFormula}=\operatorname{coeff} = \operatorname{fun} _ n w₁ w₂ I => \operatorname{ORRegularCoeff} n w₁ w₂ I

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The regular OR coefficient system. In explicit terms, for n in the natural numbers, and n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, its defining expression is ORRegular Closed Formula.to Coefficient System N n w₁ w₂.
correspondence.leanType: def ORCoefficientSystem.regular (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) : ORCoefficientSystem N

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: For N in the natural numbers, n, w₁, w₂ of type ℚ, and I of type ORIndex N, ORCoefficient System.regular N n w₁ w₂.coeff I equals ORRegular Coeff n w₁ w₂ I.
correspondence.mathematicalFormula: \forall\,N\colon \mathbb{N},\;n,w₁,w₂\colon \mathbb{Q},\;I\colon \operatorname{ORIndex} N,\quad (\operatorname{ORCoefficientSystem}.\operatorname{regular} N n w₁ w₂).\operatorname{coeff} I = \operatorname{ORRegularCoeff} n w₁ w₂ I
correspondence.leanType: theorem ORCoefficientSystem.regular_coeff (N : ℕ) (n w₁ w₂ : ℚ) (I : ORIndex N) : (ORCoefficientSystem.regular N n w₁ w₂).coeff I = ORRegularCoeff n w₁ w₂ I

references.locator: Classification of invariant bilinear differential operators
references.note: Flat-model origin of the coefficient family.
Primary curved ambient source for the encoded OR recurrence.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
